speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Childhood
questions: What were you like as a child?
Were you close to your neighbours?
Was your school far from home?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I was quite shy as a child. Yes, I was close to my neighbours. No, my school wasn't far from home.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a trip

cueCard.topic: Describe a trip you took in the past.
bullets: and explain why you remember this trip

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about a trip to Hoi An. I visited it with my family. We booked a small hotel and explored the old streets every evening. I remember this trip because we discovered a wonderful little restaurant.
